contract_claim: The document describes TAP Filtering step 6 as 'Always show coverage report at end', implying coverage is shown as part of step 6. But the shadow doc shows that coverage lines are checked at priority step 2 (before not ok / ok checks), not at the end. Coverage lines are matched via patterns like `%`, `---|`, `File |`, `All files |`, etc. throughout the stream, not just at the end.
